###### Brick, Block, Stone & Concrete

# High-Quality Masonry  & Concrete  Services

Expert repairs and installations in the Greater Toronto Area

[Get a quote](https://threelittlepigsmasonry.ca/contact-us/ "")

[Our services](https://threelittlepigsmasonry.ca/#services "")

[Our services](https://threelittlepigsmasonry.ca/#services "")

WSIB Covered

Fully compliant job standards

Liability Insured

Insured for team and property

Family Owned

Built on trust and tradition

Proudly Canadian

Backed by Canadian integrity

###### Installations, Repairs & Restorations

## Multi-award winning  masonry and concrete contractor

We are a family-owned and operated business that takes pride in delivering the highest quality work and providing exceptional customer service. We provide long-lasting installations and repairs for brick, block, and stone masonry, as well as concrete services.

700+

###### More than 700 positive reviews on HomeStars & Google

50+

###### Over 50 years of masonry and concrete expertise

13

###### Recipient of 13 prestigious masonry awards across Canada

##### Testimonials

[previous slide](https://threelittlepigsmasonry.ca/#)

![Jeff C.](https://threelittlepigsmasonry.ca/wp-content/themes/betheme/images/testimonials-placeholder.png)

> "We were very particular about the look we wanted for our new concrete front steps. Mainly that we wanted them to look like they belonged in front of our 120 year old house. They were very professional and responsive to our requirements, and made sure the bullnose overhang in particular, met our specs."

##### Jeff C.

Toronto

![Mark.](https://threelittlepigsmasonry.ca/wp-content/themes/betheme/images/testimonials-placeholder.png)

Markham

Vaughan

###### Projects

## Have a look at some of our work

We offer a comprehensive range of masonry and concrete services tailored for both residential homes and commercial properties, ensuring top-notch craftsmanship and enduring quality in every project.

###### Awards & Accolades
